title: Kalyan Jewellers is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Kalyan Jewellers is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Kalyan Jewellers in Ranchi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Kalyan Jewellers:
Kalyan Jewellers is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kalyan Jewellers!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
